description: The header links point to the correct routes (/ /blog /portfolio /videos /contact), but the 'Home' link is labeled 'Oskar Site' and other labels are lowercase instead of Title Case. Tested navigation on mobile viewport for each link and confirmed targets are correct, but labels are missing or inconsistent.

issues.name: Missing Home link label and inconsistent link casing
issues.description: Expected: The header should contain links labeled 'Home', 'Blog', 'Portfolio', 'Videos', and 'Contact' linking to '/', '/blog', '/portfolio', '/videos', and '/contact' respectively. Actual: The header contains links labeled 'Oskar Site', 'blog', 'portfolio', 'videos', and 'contact' (all lowercase except 'Oskar Site'). The label 'Home' is completely missing and replaced by 'Oskar Site'. Additionally, all other links are lowercase while the requirement implies Title Case ('Blog', 'Portfolio', etc.).
reproductionSteps: Navigate to http://localhost:3002 using a mobile viewport (375x812).
Verify if 'Home' link exists with the correct label.
issues.expectedBehavior: The header should contain links labeled 'Home', 'Blog', 'Portfolio', 'Videos', and 'Contact' linking to '/', '/blog', '/portfolio', '/videos', and '/contact' respectively.
issues.actualBehavior: The header contains links labeled 'Oskar Site', 'blog', 'portfolio', 'videos', and 'contact' (all lowercase except 'Oskar Site'). The label 'Home' is completely missing and replaced by 'Oskar Site'. Additionally, all other links are lowercase while the requirement implies Title Case ('Blog', 'Portfolio', etc.).

issues.name: Header links labels use lowercase casing
issues.description: Expected: Header links should use Title Case labels: 'Home', 'Blog', 'Portfolio', 'Videos', and 'Contact'. Actual: The header navigation links 'blog', 'portfolio', 'videos', and 'contact' are all lowercase. The requirement implies 'Blog', 'Portfolio', 'Videos', and 'Contact'. Additionally, the 'Home' link is labeled as 'Oskar Site'.
reproductionSteps: Navigate to http://localhost:3002/ in a mobile viewport.
Observe the navigation link labels in the header.
issues.expectedBehavior: Header links should use Title Case labels: 'Home', 'Blog', 'Portfolio', 'Videos', and 'Contact'.
issues.actualBehavior: The header navigation links 'blog', 'portfolio', 'videos', and 'contact' are all lowercase. The requirement implies 'Blog', 'Portfolio', 'Videos', and 'Contact'. Additionally, the 'Home' link is labeled as 'Oskar Site'.
